title: Endamantium
description: The Endamantium mod adds another tier to Minecraft's progression. This is a vanilla+ mod that aims to add a goal to reach after defeating the ender dragon.
body:
The Endamantium mod adds another tier to Minecraft's progression. This is a vanilla+ mod that aims to add a goal to reach after defeating the ender dragon.

Use resources you've gathered to craft the Hellforge; a powerful furnace fuled by dragon's breath capable of processing Mysterious Debris found in the end. Upgrade your netherite tools and armor to the End teir of their strength!

These new Endamantium items have higher durability than netherite, as well as the tools having higher mining speed and damage.
